title: Roblox Corp Reports Strong 2024 Financial Results and Provides 2025 Guidance
text: Roblox reported a 32% year-over-year increase in revenue for Q4 2024, reaching $988.2 million. Full-year 2024 revenue totaled $3,602.0 million, a 29% increase from 2023. For Q4 2024, bookings came in at $1,361.6 million, up 21% year-over-year, while full-year 2024 bookings reached $4,369.1 million, up 24% from 2023. Free cash flow surged 417% year-over-year to $641.3 million in 2024, demonstrating improving cash generation despite continued net losses. Daily active users averaged 82.9 million in Q4 2024, up 21% from the year-ago quarter. Hours engaged reached 73.5 billion in the quarter, up 23% year-over-year. The company reported a net loss of $221.1 million for Q4 2024 but improved adjusted EBITDA to $65.6 million. Looking ahead to 2025, Roblox provided guidance reflecting continued strong growth expectations while managing profitability challenges. Analysts maintained bullish sentiment with 7 buy ratings against 0 sell ratings, though median price targets showed some caution about near-term execution risks.
